# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: http-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway # Use the default Istio ingress gateway
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - "*" # Allow any host to be routed by this gateway
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: my-app-vs
  namespace: default # Or the namespace where your service resides
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*" # Route all incoming host requests to this VirtualService
  gateways:
  - http-gateway # Bind this VirtualService to the Gateway we just created
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /
    route:
    - destination:
        host: my-service # Replace with the actual name of your service in the mesh
        port:
          number: 80 # Replace with the port your service is listening on
